sources.label: REAL clearance status
sources.note: Parivesh is a JS SPA backed by JSON APIs; capture the proposal-detail endpoint from the browser Network tab locally, then implement parse(). No proposal fabricated. Gates tracked: ToR, EC, FC-I, FC-II, NBWL

sources.note: eCourts case-status search is CAPTCHA-gated (guardrail: no captcha). Supply known CNRs via Prince's existing eCourts scraper; this refreshes order history for those CNRs only. No case number fabricated.
